title: poa iridifolia
intro: Poa iridifolia, also known as the rainbow grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Poa iridifolia include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Poa iridifolia is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its dried roots and rhizomes are used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal benefits.
